extension.displayName: Cursor IME HUD (Chinese IME Status Indicator)
extension.description: Caret-adjacent Chinese/English IME status indicator for VS Code and Cursor on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
commands.toggleOverlay.title: Toggle Overlay
commands.refreshImeState.title: Refresh IME State
commands.showDiagnostics.title: Show Diagnostics
commands.showStatusBarMenu.title: Show Status Bar Menu
configuration.title: Cursor IME HUD (Chinese IME Status Indicator)
configuration.overlay.enabled.descriptio: Show the IME status indicator next to the caret in the active text editor.
configuration.overlay.labelPreset.descri: Label style for IME state: Chinese characters (中/英) or Latin letters (ZH/EN).
configuration.overlay.labelPreset.enum.z: Use Chinese character labels: Chinese mode shows 中, English mode shows 英.
configuration.overlay.labelPreset.enum.e: Use Latin letter labels: Chinese mode shows ZH, English mode shows EN.
configuration.overlay.cnColor.descriptio: Accent color for Chinese mode (for example #FF5252 or rgb(255,82,82)).
configuration.overlay.enColor.descriptio: Accent color for English mode (for example #1E90FF or rgb(30,144,255)).
Draw a rounded background in text-only mode.
Background opacity from 0 to 1. Controls the icon tile fill in text+icon mode and the text background in text mode.
configuration.overlay.mode.markdownDescr: Overlay display mode. `text+icon` shows the label inside a compact tile; `text` shows a compact text-only label.
configuration.statusBar.enabled.descript: Show the current IME state in the status bar.
configuration.overlay.hideWhenEditorUnfo: Hide the caret overlay when the VS Code/Cursor window loses focus.
configuration.overlay.offsetX.descriptio: Horizontal overlay offset in the range (-50 ~ 50). Scales with the editor zoom.
configuration.overlay.offsetY.descriptio: Vertical overlay offset in the range (-50 ~ 50). Scales with the editor zoom.
